test_results.raw_response:
service db {
  image "postgres:16"
  replicas 3
  ports 5432:5432
  env POSTGRES_USER=admin,POSTGRES_PASSWORD=secret
  volumes "/pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data"
}
